Dice Serpent

Developed by: Srarts

About the Game

Welcome to the world of Dice Serpent! An innovative puzzle and arcade game that seamlessly merges the classic mechanics of snake movement with the strategic elements of rolling dice. Control your growing serpent, calculate your moves, collect multipliers, and climb the global leaderboards.

Featuring a vibrant visual style, captivating sound effects, and progressively challenging levels, Dice Serpent promises hours of engaging gameplay suitable for all age groups.
